allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\(json.dumps\([\(c['id'],c.get\('state'\),c.get\('redReasons',[]\)[:3]\) for c in d.get\('cards',[]\) if c.get\('state'\)!='BLUE'], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load\(sys.stdin\);print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k!='cards'}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\);print\('cards keys',list\(d.get\('cards',{}\).keys\(\)\)[:5] if isinstance\(d.get\('cards'\),dict\) else 'list'\)")

Bash(awk -F'"' '{tests+=$2; skipped+=$4; failures+=$6; errors+=$8} END {printf "TOTAL tests=%d skipped=%d failures=%d errors=%d\\n", tests, skipped, failures, errors}')

Bash(python3 -c "import json;d=json.load\(open\('build/harness/findings/scenarios.findings.json'\)\);fs=d if isinstance\(d,list\) else d.get\('findings',[]\);req=[f for f in fs if 'REQ-014' in json.dumps\(f,ensure_ascii=False\)];print\('total',len\(fs\),'| REQ-014',len\(req\)\);[print\(' ',f.get\('ruleId'\),f.get\('severity'\),str\(f.get\('message',''\)\)[:90]\) for f in req]")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./build/harness/indexes/change-sets.index.json'\); for\(const e of j.entries\){console.log\(e.location.file\); console.log\('  status=',e.status,'| types=',JSON.stringify\(e.changeTypes\),'| affected=',e.affectedRequirementIds.length,'| sectionsPresent=',Object.values\(e.sectionPresent\).filter\(Boolean\).length+'/'+Object.keys\(e.sectionPresent\).length\);}")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./build/harness/reports/change-set-report.json'\); const cs=j.changeSets[0]; const bad=cs.affectedRequirements.filter\(r=>r.schemaStatus!=='complete'\); console.log\('affected total',cs.affectedRequirements.length,'| non-complete schema:',bad.map\(r=>r.id+':'+r.schemaStatus\).join\(', '\)||'none'\);")

Bash(node -e "const j=require\('./build/harness/indexes/change-sets.index.json'\); console.log\('top-level issues:',JSON.stringify\(j.issues\)\); for\(const e of j.entries\){console.log\(e.location.file,'| status=',e.status,'| types=',JSON.stringify\(e.changeTypes\),'| 논의상태=',JSON.stringify\(e.discussionStatus\),'| openDisc=',e.openDiscussions.length,'| entry.issues=',e.issues.length\);}")

Bash(node -e "try{const r=require\('./app/front-end/test-results/e2e-results.json'\); const files=new Set\(\); \(function walk\(s\){for\(const x of s\){if\(x.specs\){for\(const sp of x.specs\){files.add\(sp.file||x.file\)}}if\(x.suites\)walk\(x.suites\)}}\)\(r.suites||[]\); console.log\([...files]\)}catch\(e\){console.log\('no results file or parse error:', e.message\)}")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./app/front-end/test-results/e2e-live-results.json'\); \(function walk\(s\){for\(const x of s\){if\(x.specs\){for\(const sp of x.specs\){console.log\('file=',JSON.stringify\(sp.file\),'title=',sp.title\)}}if\(x.suites\)walk\(x.suites\)}}\)\(r.suites||[]\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./app/front-end/test-results/e2e-results.json'\); let done=false;\(function walk\(s\){for\(const x of s\){if\(done\)return;if\(x.specs\){for\(const sp of x.specs\){console.log\('file=',JSON.stringify\(sp.file\)\);done=true;break}}if\(x.suites\)walk\(x.suites\)}}\)\(r.suites||[]\)")

Bash(node -e "const r=require\('./app/front-end/test-results/e2e-live-results.json'\); console.log\('stats=',JSON.stringify\(r.stats\)\); \(function walk\(s\){for\(const x of s\){if\(x.specs\){for\(const sp of x.specs\){const st=\(sp.tests||[]\).map\(t=>t.status||t.results?.map\(rr=>rr.status\)\).flat\(\); console.log\(sp.title,'=>',JSON.stringify\(st\)\)}}if\(x.suites\)walk\(x.suites\)}}\)\(r.suites||[]\)")
